requirements-discovery.description: Explore and challenge repository-backed product requirements

plan-validation.description: Challenge a plan before implementation begins

definition.description: Synthesize agreed scope and acceptance criteria into a spec

ticket-breakdown.description: Split a spec or plan into tracer-bullet tickets with blocking edges

prototype.description: Build throwaway code to answer one design question

research.description: Investigate a question against primary sources

wayfinding.description: Map decisions for a genuinely large multi-session effort

lean-design-check.description: Lean engineering gate evaluation before implementation

implementation.description: Implement a scoped spec or ticket using TDD at agreed seams

test-driven-development.description: Build one concrete behavior through a red-green loop

verification.description: Run automated checks and collect evidence

code-review.description: Review a diff against repository standards and its originating spec

architecture-review.description: Find concrete opportunities to deepen codebase modules

complexity-review.description: Run the native lean complexity-reduction review

merge-conflict-resolution.description: Resolve an in-progress merge or rebase from primary-source intent

handoff-or-ship.description: Produce a compact handoff before the human chooses handoff or shipping operations

human-decision.description: A decision that requires human input — no automated resolver
